name: Phase Milestone Update
about: Report progress on a Phase 1, 2, or 3 factory milestone
title: "[MILESTONE] <phase> — <milestone name>"
labels: milestone, phase-update
assignees: ''
---

## Milestone Details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Phase** | <!-- Phase 1 / Phase 2 / Phase 3 --> |
| **Milestone Name** | <!-- e.g., "SMT line commissioned and producing first boards" --> |
| **Target Date** | <!-- YYYY-MM-DD --> |
| **Actual / Revised Date** | <!-- YYYY-MM-DD or "on track" --> |
| **Status** | <!-- Not Started / In Progress / Complete / At Risk / Delayed --> |
| **Owner** | <!-- Name / team responsible --> |

---

## Progress Summary

<!-- Describe what has been achieved towards this milestone. Be specific about completions. -->

## Blockers / Issues

<!-- List any blockers, risks, or issues preventing progress on this milestone. -->

| # | Blocker | Impact | Mitigation | Owner | ETA |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | | | | | |

## Actions Required

<!-- List specific actions needed to unblock or complete this milestone. -->

- [ ] Action 1 — Owner — Due Date
- [ ] Action 2 — Owner — Due Date
